ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each stock (ticker symbol) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock (company name) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the stock */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily data entry */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Reference to the stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price reached during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price reached during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded during the day */,
  "money" REAL /* Total money traded during the day */,
  "change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price */,
  "volume_weighted_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_data_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Reference to the stock */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit of the company */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the financial data is reported */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Operating cash flow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact and verification */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last user login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock in a portfolio */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Reference to the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Average purchase price of the shares */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the shares were purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock in a watchlist */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the watchlist */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Reference to the stock */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Reference to the stock */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Reference to the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Reference to the stock */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
